findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem (antipode_tmul|counit_tmul|comul_tmul)|/--" TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/HopfBaseChange.lean` shows no docstrings before lines 64, 70, and 76; the module docstring says the file records these formulas.
findings.fix: Add docstrings to these theorems describing the scalar-extended antipode, counit, and comultiplication formulas.
findings.issue: The public pure-tensor formulas `antipode_tmul`, `counit_tmul`, and `comul_tmul` are undocumented despite being part of the advertised base-change API.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem (baseChangeValue_tmul|baseChangeValue_include|baseChangeValueEquiv_symm_apply|comp_baseChangeValue|baseChangeValueEquiv_symm_comp)|/--" TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/HopfBaseChange.lean` shows these public theorems at lines 102, 107, 113, 121, and 128 with no preceding docstrings.
findings.fix: Add short docstrings explaining the tensor formula, restriction to the inclusion, inverse equivalence evaluation, and naturality under postcomposition.
findings.issue: The public computation and naturality lemmas for `baseChangeValue` are undocumented, including `baseChangeValue_tmul`, `baseChangeValue_include`, `baseChangeValueEquiv_symm_apply`, `comp_baseChangeValue`, and `baseChangeValueEquiv_symm_comp`.

summary: The new file has a useful module docstring and documents its public definitions, but several roadmap-facing public theorems are undocumented. These are substantive formulas/naturality lemmas rather than incidental helper lemmas.
